positive: A detailed, rustic line art illustration of a steaming cup of coffee next to an open book and a potted succulent. The style should be cozy, hand-drawn, and black and white, suitable for an engraving or etching effect. Focus on texture and steam details.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, digital painting, overly colored
